name: Coffee Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve instant coffee powder in 1/4 cup water and set aside.
2. Sift together flour, 1/2 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add oil, egg yolks, water with coffee mixture, and vanilla. Beat at high speed of an electric mixer for about 5 minutes or until satiny smooth.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites and cream of tartar until soft peaks form. Add remaining 1/2 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, and beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Pour the egg yolk mixture into the egg white mixture in a thin, steady stream and gently fold with a spatula until well combined.
6. Pour the batter into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan and spread evenly with a spatula.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour or until the cake springs back when lightly touched. Invert the pan and cool for 40 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the sides of the pan using a narrow metal spatula, then remove it from the pan.
